scope.summary: Implement `SoftBodySpec` (closed volumetric mesh + volume constraint parameters) and wire it through the XPBD solver alongside cloth panels using the existing volume/pressure constraint (MT-020), so arbitrary imported OBJ/FBX meshes can be simulated as deformable soft-body props in the same solver pass as garments
acceptance_criteria: `SoftBodySpec` is defined with fields: `mesh_obj_ref: String` (path to uploaded OBJ/FBX), `fabric_preset: Option<String>` (MAT- id), `pressure: f32`, `collision_thickness_mm: f32`; it is embedded as `soft_bodies: Vec<SoftBodySpec>` in `GarmentSpec`

The `GarmentSpec`-to-`SolverMesh` pipeline tessellates a `SoftBodySpec` mesh into particles and emits: stretch constraints on surface edges, dihedral bend constraints on surface interior edges, and one volume constraint per closed mesh region (reusing the MT-020 volume/pressure constraint)

Soft-body particles are included in the same 8-pass compute dispatch as cloth particles; cloth-vs-soft-body collision uses the same capsule/sphere collision hook (MT-086/MT-087) treating soft-body surface particles as collision targets

An integration test creates a closed sphere mesh as a `SoftBodySpec` with `pressure = 1.0`, drapes a cloth panel over it, and asserts: the sphere inflates to the target volume (volume constraint passes), the cloth does not penetrate the sphere surface (NO_INTERPENETRATION passes), and the simulation is deterministic (MeshComparator passes twice)
scope.risk_if_missed: Props like bags, pillows, foam collars, stuffed accessories, and inflatable garments cannot be simulated inside Tailor; these must be faked with rigid trims or handled externally, breaking the Handshake-native end-to-end pipeline for soft-prop-heavy fashion scenes.

risks: Broad MT scope can hide multiple review targets.
Markdown MT lists may disagree with packet-declared active/next MT truth.
Receipt routing may target an old MT if contract identity is omitted.
minimum_controls: Exactly one primary proof target per MT unless the packet records why not.
MT identity must be stable and referenced by receipt correlation.
Generated projection drift must not wake Coder or Validator by itself.
